title: Application Engineer
description:
**about amy’s**



at amy’s kitchen, we're more than just a food company—we're a family\-owned, proudly independent organic, and vegetarian food company on a mission. as a certified b corporation®, our purpose is clear: to make it simple and enjoyable for everyone to eat well.



we're committed to crafting authentic, mouthwatering dishes using only the finest organic ingredients sourced with care. from farm to table, we ensure top\-notch quality in every bite, making healthy eating accessible and convenient for all. at amy’s, we're not just serving meals; we're serving up a taste of goodness, one delicious dish at a time.


**perks are as delicious as our meals!**



comprehensive health plans with medical, dental, and vision coverage, plus flexible spending accounts. mental health support with modern health to nourish your and your family’s mental well\-being. 401(k) retirement plan with employer match and financial wellness support at no cost to plan for the future. referral rewards and scholarship program to celebrate and invest in our teams. tuition reimbursement program to fuel your educational pursuits. paid parental leave for new parents. paid time off for vacations and sick days, with 9 paid us holidays annually to savor those special moments. amy's product discount reimbursement to keep your pantry stocked, plus remote gym discounts to keep you moving and grooving! join us and indulge in a career where the benefits are as fulfilling as our food!


**bay area california compensation:** $97,600 \- $146,400

  

* other locations are subject to a lower range.


the application engineer is responsible for developing, integrating, and maintaining data applications, pipelines, and processes across platforms such as azure data factory, azure synapse, databricks, sql, power bi, and oracle bi tools. they collaborate with business analysts, internal customers, and developers to clarify requirements, design solutions, and implement features, reports, and dashboards. the role involves creating workflows that ingest, clean, and transform data from multiple sources, ensuring reliable, timely, and analytics\-ready datasets. additionally, the data engineer supports and administers assigned applications and etl/elt processes, while ensuring the organization’s data foundation is secure, efficient, and scalable to meet the needs of analysts, data scientists, and business stakeholders.


**essential responsibilities** *(includes, but are not limited to the following):*


**design and development**


* design, build, maintain, and improve custom data processes and pipelines using etl/elt processes to collect, process, aggregate, and transform data from various sources for both batch and real\-time processing to meet business requirements.
* analyze business requirements and use cases and translate them into technical solution designs.
* employ industry standard design patterns and company practices.


**testing**


* write groups of tests that exercise multiple requirements scenarios
* suggest and document user acceptance testing and facilitate the process and training of testers. perform acceptance testing as appropriate.
* configure and manage test automation


**support, debugging \& problem solving**


* perform support for escalated support issues.
* troubleshoot data application, process, and pipeline issues by reviewing code, analyzing data, reviewing logs, and tracing code execution through multiple functions, modules, or applications. perform root\-cause\-analysis of problems.
* propose and implement most bug fixes or changes to correct assigned issues. assist in creating more complex solutions to issues found.


**software development life cycle (sdlc)**


* participate in development planning, project management, and agile (ex: scrum) activities. estimate assigned work, help to plan sprints and releases, and demonstrate completed work.


**revision control \& release management**


* manage revision control for owned projects. manage release branches. prepare deployment artifacts or packages and perform deployments and migration.
* perform refreshes and clones of supporting application and data environments per established procedures.


**administration**


* identify and perform day\-to\-day administrative tasks in supported application and data platforms and development tooling. support end\-user administrators and it services team.


**ai/ml**


* experience integrating ai/ml models into data pipelines using platforms such as azure ai, databricks, or ml frameworks to support analytics and operational use cases
* familiarity with large language models (llms) and their application in data enrichment, metadata generation, and automation of data engineering tasks
* knowledge of prompt engineering concepts and integrating ai services (e.g., apis, copilot, azure openai) into data workflows
* understanding of responsible ai practices, including data privacy, bias mitigation, model governance, and security controls
* experience operationalizing models (mlops) including deployment, monitoring, versioning, and performance tracking
* ability to collaborate with data scientists and business teams to productionize ai use cases and ensure scalability and reliability


*it is the responsibility of all employees to uphold the mission of the amy’s food safety and quality policy. this includes following all food safety and sustainability programs and participating in all required training.*

**qualifications**



to perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. the requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.


**technical knowledge and skills**

fundamental skills


* experience with project management and delivery methodologies.
* knowledge of report building tools and concepts.
* excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* ability to stay organized amidst multiple time demands.

languages \& development


* utilizing sql, pl/sql, dax, power query (m), and shell scripting, able to create and debug a wide array of data processes, pipelines, applications, and functionality. fluent with most essential language capabilities and syntax in the data engineering space. able to determine and utilize appropriate design patterns.
* hands\-on experience with azure data factory, azure synapse, databricks, etl/elt tools, and related data processing and warehousing tools.
* able to create builds and deployment processes according to company policy utilizing tools such as azure devops and ci/cd pipelines.


sql and database skills


* able to create complex queries in sql, pl/sql, and power query (m) languages, including joins, conditional functions, sub\-selects, and other more advanced patterns against azure sql and oracle databases and erp systems (ex: ebs and obiee).
* able to create and manage stored procedures, indexes, views, and transactions. able to perform essential query performance debugging.
* strong understanding of data modeling, analytics, and reporting concepts, including databases, data warehousing, sql, cloud services, integration strategies, and high availability/disaster recovery (hadr).


scripting and sysadmin


* able to write shell scripts using bash, power\-shell, or similar tools. very comfortable on the command\-line for administration of linux/windows servers. able manage basic services and settings (for example init scripts, registry, etc.)


revision control system (rcs)


* comfortable with most functions of revision control systems such as git, svn, and azure devops. able to manage branches and tags.


software development life cycle (sdlc)


* able to lead the design, testing, and implementation phases of the sdlc in either waterfall or agile methodologies.


knowledge of security protocols


* can evaluate and employ security concepts such as privileged services, transport encryption, certificates.

agile/scrum \& project management


* can describe fundamental agile principles and methodologies as well as other project management principles. able to lead sprint planning sessions and other project and development activities for small to moderately complex projects.


**professional skills**

time management / organizational skills


* manage time and stay organized amidst multiple time demands.


listening and communication skills


* paraphrase to ensure understanding. can explain the complex in clear terms.


writing skills


* write organized, concise e\-mails and other documents.


presentation skills


* make effective presentations across it and to other groups.


influencing skills


* influence peers and customers via strong relationships and technical credibility. rarely needs management assistance to influence laterally.


meeting facilitation skills


* manage effective meetings and facilitate group decisions.


company knowledge


* understand amy’s basic business model, including key cost drivers and ways it can contribute to it.


industry knowledge


* keep current with industry trends, best practices, and market leaders.


strategic thinking


* anticipate cross\-technology and cross\-functional impact of decisions and actions.


problem solving


* identify root causes of problems and make data\-driven decisions on solutions.


customer focus


* clarify internal customer expectations and regularly check in on performance against them.


drive for results


* overcome obstacles he/she can manage and seek assistance for those he/she cannot.


education


* four\-year degree in cs or related field (or equivalent experience), or an equivalent combination of education and/or experience that demonstrates the required qualifications and skills.


certificates, licenses, registrations



preferred but not required:


* azure data engineer associate
* databricks certified data engineer associate/professional
* power bi data analyst associate.


experience


* 2\-5 years of experience in data engineering and analytics, with demonstrated expertise in both batch and near\-real\-time data processing


**physical demands**

the employee is occasionally required to use hands to finger, handle, or feel; reach with hands and arms; climb or balance; and stoop, kneel, crouch, or crawl. the employee may occasionally lift and/or move up to 25 pounds. specific vision abilities required by this job include close vision, and color vision.



the physical demands described here are representative of those that must be met by an employee to successfully perform the essential functions of this job. reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.


**work environment:**



work is performed in an office environment where the physical demands require sitting for extended periods of time; frequent use of computers and standard office equipment; may work under stress of deadlines. rarely, the employee may be exposed to risk of electrical shock, moving mechanical parts; high, precarious or enclosed places, fumes, dust or airborne particles, and extreme cold. the noise level in the work environment is usually light.



the work environment characteristics described here are representative of those an employee encounters while performing the essential functions of this job. reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.


**travel:**

this position requires occasional travel (\<5%) for team and program activities.


**remote or hybrid work option:**

this position requires employees that live within 50 miles of the amy’s petaluma office to be in the office three days per week. employees that live greater than 50 miles from amy’s petaluma office are exempt from the 3 days per week mandate but must visit the petaluma office on a regular cadence.


equal opportunity employer/protected veterans/individuals with disabilities  

this employer is required to notify all applicants of their rights pursuant to federal employment laws. for further information, please review the know your rights (https://www.eeoc.gov/poster) notice from the department of labor.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
the machine learning and data engineer role will lead the development, implementation, and maintenance of data pipelines and infrastructure to support the deployment and continuous monitoring of machine learning (ml) and generative artificial intelligence (ai) tools within ucsf’s apex enabled research (aer) team. most projects will be in partnership with other ucsf technical teams and involve highly customized research solutions. communication skills and inventive technical solutioning are crucial.  



the aer team provides a large array of services to the ucsf research community, including project consultation, grant support, budget estimations, and project implementation and support. project examples include:


* development of ehr\-based interventions via clinical trials embedded within healthcare delivery systems to generate scientific evidence while delivering healthcare.



	+ enabling ucsf researchers with algorithms, digital tools and / or clinical interventions with strong evidence of feasibility and acceptability.
	+ develop technical approaches and budgets in order to implement these tools within the electronic medical record.
	+ supporting the development of scalable, low cost infrastructure to enable ongoing research.

this role primarily involves managing and optimizing the data and monitoring pipelines of the health it platform for advanced computing (hipac), a cloud infrastructure that supports the development and deployment of ai/ml tools, including large language models (llms) in the ehr. specifically, the ml/data engineer will work on implementing new data integrations, enhancing hipac’s etl functionalities, productionizing ai/ml tools developed by ucsf data scientists/researchers, and designing and implementing metrics to continuously monitor ai/ml tools deployed at ucsf health.


competitive applicants for this position are software, machine learning, or data engineers with 6\+ years of experience in implementing and maintaining ai/ml pipelines. proficiency in mlops, python, sql, and ci/cd is required. this role also requires a deep understanding of epic data models (clarity and caboodle). successful candidates either have or are able to obtain epic clinical/clarity data model certification shortly after onboarding.  



**department overview** 

the university of california, san francisco (ucsf) department of information technology academic research systems (ars) group is chartered to provide data services and infrastructure that support the ucsf research community’s computing and analytic requirements through centralized informatics services in the areas of data, tools, secure compute environments, and consulting services.


  
**required qualifications**

* bachelor's degree in computer science, computer engineering, or related area and / or equivalent experience/training.
* 6 years of experience in positions of increasing responsibility designing, implementing, and maintaining complex ai/ml applications.
* advanced experience with sql (e.g., sqlserver, postgresql)
* advanced experience in database systems, data warehousing solutions, and understanding of etl pipelines
* advanced experience in designing, building, or maintaining data infrastructure for efficient ml model training and inference.
* experience with data analysis and machine learning tools such as jupyter, pandas, scikit\-learn, numpy/scipy, pytorch, etc.
* demonstrated advanced knowledge of full software development lifecycle
* advanced experience with python; ability to write clean, efficient, and production\-level python code
* demonstrated experience deploying, monitoring, and maintaining ai/ml models and pipelines
* demonstrated experience working with mlops, devops, and ci/cd pipeline toolsets
* experience in developing complex, automated testing
* experience with cloud\-based architecture in platforms such as aws, gcp, azure
* demonstrated effective communication and interpersonal skills
* demonstrated ability to communicate technical information to technical and non\-technical personnel at various levels in the organization
* self\-motivated and works independently and as part of a team. able to learn effectively and meet deadlines
* demonstrated broad problem\-solving skills
* demonstrated ability to interface with management on a regular basis
* excellent project leadership and management skills.

**preferred qualifications**

* master’s degree or phd in computer science, computer engineering, or related area and / or equivalent experience / training.
* epic clarity certification
* cloud development certifications
* experience with large language models and other generative ai technologies, especially supporting the deployment of genai\-based tools in a production environment
* familiar with data visualization tools (e.g., tableau)
* experience with epic data structures

title: Python Developer
description:
**location: remote \| type: contract**

  

  

**about newpage solutions**


newpage solutions is a global digital health innovation company helping people live longer, healthier lives. we partner with life sciences organisations which include, pharmaceutical, biotech and healthcare leaders, to build transformative ai and data driven technologies addressing real\-world health challenges.

  

from strategy and research to ux design and agile development, we deliver and validate impactful solutions using lean, human\-centered practices.

  



we are proud to be a ‘great place to work®’ certified company for the last three consecutive years. we also hold a top glassdoor rating and are named among the "top 50 most promising healthcare solution providers" by cioreview.

  

as an organisation, we foster creativity, continuous learning and inclusivity, creating an environment where bold ideas thrive and make a measurable difference in people’s lives.

  

  

**your mission**


we are looking for a mid\-senior python developer to join our content supply chain platforms team delivery team and contribute directly to the automation, integration, and ai\-augmented tooling that underpins our content supply chain. this is not a traditional software engineering role — we are looking for someone who is highly adaptable, curious about new technologies, and skilled at using ai tools like claude and github copilot as genuine force multipliers. you will work alongside martech delivery leads and platform architects to build, extend, and maintain python\-based solutions that connect content platforms, automate workflows, and support ai\-driven content operations. the ideal candidate is a problem solver at heart, a prompt engineer by practice, and a fast learner who actively embraces change.

  



**what you’ll do**


**1\. python development \& automation**


* build, maintain, and extend python scripts, microservices, and automation pipelines supporting content supply chain workflows
* develop integrations between martech platforms (e.g., veeva vault, aem, workfront, dam systems) using rest apis and sdks
* write clean, documented, reusable code with appropriate unit testing and version control (git)
* optimize existing scripts and workflows for performance, reliability, and scalability
* participate in code reviews and contribute to team coding standards and best practices

**2\. ai\-augmented development (claude \& github copilot)**


* actively leverage claude (anthropic) and github copilot as core development tools — using them to accelerate coding, generate boilerplate, debug, and explore solutions
* design and engineer prompts for llm\-based tools to solve specific content supply chain automation and delivery challenges
* explore and prototype ai\-assisted workflows that reduce manual effort in content operations
* stay current on new ai development tools, apis, and capabilities; evaluate and recommend adoption of relevant new tooling
* document and share prompt engineering patterns and ai tool best practices with the broader delivery team

**3\. platform integration \& data engineering**


* build and maintain api integrations with enterprise martech platforms including content management, project management, and digital asset systems
* develop data transformation and etl processes to support reporting, analytics, and workflow automation
* troubleshoot and resolve integration failures, data quality issues, and pipeline errors
* work with architects to design scalable integration patterns and maintain technical documentation

**4\. agile delivery \& collaboration**


* actively participate in agile ceremonies: sprint planning, stand\-ups, refinement, reviews, and retrospectives
* collaborate closely with bas, qa, and platform engineers to deliver sprint commitments
* proactively communicate progress, blockers, and risks to delivery leads
* support uat and production validation of developed solutions
* contribute to effort estimation and sprint capacity planning

**5\. problem solving \& continuous improvement**


* take ownership of ambiguous technical challenges — decompose problems, propose options, and drive to resolution
* proactively identify inefficiencies in existing workflows and propose automation or tooling improvements
* contribute to team knowledge by documenting solutions, patterns, and lessons learned in confluence or equivalent
* mentor junior developers and contribute to a culture of technical excellence and continuous learning

**what you bring**


* python proficiency — expert\-level python development: clean, maintainable, well\-tested code across scripts, apis, and automation pipelines
* ai tool fluency — power user of claude (anthropic) and github copilot; uses these tools to accelerate development, debug faster, and augment code quality
* prompt engineering — ability to craft, iterate, and optimize prompts for llm\-based tools to solve real delivery and automation problems
* problem solving — breaks down ambiguous, complex technical challenges into pragmatic, phased solutions; comfortable working without a fully defined spec
* technology learner — actively seeks to upskill on emerging technologies, frameworks, and ai capabilities
* collaboration \& communication — communicates clearly with non\-technical stakeholders; works effectively in agile cross\-functional teams across time zones
* nearshore delivery mindset — experienced in remote/nearshore team dynamics; reliable, proactive communicator with strong async collaboration habits

**required qualifications**


* 4–7 years of professional python development experience in enterprise or martech environments
* demonstrated experience using claude (anthropic) or equivalent llm tools and github copilot as active development aids
* practical prompt engineering skills: ability to craft, iterate, and optimize prompts for real automation and coding tasks
* strong experience with rest api integration and working with third\-party platform sdks
* proficiency with git, version control workflows, and collaborative development practices
* experience working in agile/scrum delivery teams with cross\-functional stakeholders
* solid problem\-solving capability — comfortable with under\-defined requirements and iterative discovery
* strong async communication skills; experience in nearshore/remote delivery model
* bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, information systems, or equivalent practical experience

**preferred qualifications**


* experience with martech platforms: veeva vault, adobe aem, workfront, or dam/pim systems
* familiarity with content supply chain, content operations, or omnichannel marketing technology
* experience with cloud platforms (aws, azure, gcp) and containerization (docker, kubernetes)
* knowledge of data engineering tools: pandas, pyspark, airflow, or equivalent pipeline frameworks
* exposure to ml frameworks or llm apis (anthropic, openai, hugging face) for applied use cases
* experience in pharmaceutical, life sciences, or highly regulated industry environments
* familiarity with validated system environments (gxp, 21 cfr part 11\) is a plus
* proficiency in english (written and verbal) at a professional working level for est\-timezone collaboration

**what we offer**
  

at newpage, we’re building a company that works smart and grows with agility, where driven individuals come together to do work that matters. we offer:


* a people\-first culture \- supportive peers, open communication and a strong sense of belonging
* smart, purposeful collaboration \- work with talented colleagues to create technologies that solve meaningful business challenges
* balance that lasts \- we respect your time and support a healthy integration of work and life
* room to grow \- opportunities for learning, leadership and career development, shaped around you
* meaningful rewards \- competitive compensation that recognises both contribution and potential
  

  

**ready to apply?**
  

let’s build the future of health together. apply below or reach out to:
  

*bhavik.rathod@newpage.io*


#### **more about newpage**


newpage is a digital health solutions company. we devote ourselves to advancing the quality of life by enhancing health and optimizing the longevity of people. we do this by, passionately building futuristic technologies for global organizations across the healthcare ecosystem. we partake at every stage from problem definition, strategy \& service design, user research, ux design, and agile software development – utilizing lean practices to deliver and validate highly innovative digital health solutions that drive user value and business transformation.


newpage is recognized by ‘cio’s review’ as “top 50 promising healthcare solution providers” and great place to work certified (gptw) 2023 \& 2024\.

title: AI Engineer
description:
job title \- ai engineer
  
\*\* must have 3\+ years of real hands on experience of ai development\*\*
  
ai engineer with strong python programming expertise and hands\-on experience in building scalable data pipelines, automating workflows, and integrating ai capabilities into data engineering processes. the role involves developing robust data processing scripts, creating reusable validation frameworks, and orchestrating workflows using tools such as apache airflow, while leveraging core libraries like pandas, sqlalchemy, requests, and pyspark. the candidate should be proficient in working with xml\-based data formats, including parsing, transforming, and managing xml within informatica and python environments, with solid knowledge of xpath, xslt, and schema validation. additionally, the role requires practical exposure to ai/llm integration, including prompt design, working with rest\-based apis, and using tools such as claude code and gpt codex to accelerate development. the candidate is expected to apply strong engineering judgment to validate ai\-generated outputs, follow best coding practices, contribute to shared libraries, and ensure scalable, secure, and maintainable solutions. strong ownership, analytical thinking, and the ability to collaborate across teams, mentor junior members, and work effectively within agile and ci/cd environments are essential.
  
  

**key expectations:**  

strong python development with focus on modular, reusable, and well\-documented code
  
experience with data processing, automation, and workflow orchestration (e.g., airflow)
  
proficiency in pandas, sqlalchemy, requests, and pyspark
  
hands\-on experience with xml processing, xpath, xslt, and informatica integration
  
extensive informatica powercenter expertise in designing and managing complex etl workflows (mappings, sessions, workflows, worklets) with performance optimization (partition tuning, pushdown optimization, cache management)
  
practical exposure to ai/llm integration, prompt engineering, and api\-based workflows
  
ability to leverage ai tools (claude code, gpt codex) for development acceleration
  
strong ownership of end\-to\-end delivery (design through deployment)
  
experience working in agile teams with git and ci/cd pipelines
  
strong communication skills with both technical and business stakeholders
  
  

**salary and other compensation:**  

the annual salary for this position is between $120\-135k depending on experience and other qualifications of the successful candidate.
  
this position is also eligible for cognizant’s discretionary annual incentive program, based on performance and subject to the terms of cognizant’s applicable plans.
  
**benefits:** cognizant offers the following benefits for this position, subject to applicable eligibility requirements:
  
* medical/dental/vision/life insurance
* paid holidays plus paid time off
* 401(k) plan and contributions
* long\-term/short\-term disability
* paid parental leave
* employee stock purchase plan


**disclaimer:** the salary, other compensation, and benefits information is accurate as of the date of this posting. cognizant reserves the right to modify this information at any time, subject to applicable law.

title: Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect & Developer
description:
matrix global services is seeking a highly skilled **microsoft power platform solution architect \& developer** to design, develop, and govern enterprise\-scale power platform solutions for clients across financial services, consumer packaged goods (cpg), retail, and construction industries.


this role combines **solution architecture, hands\-on development, and business analysis**, requiring a professional who can translate complex business requirements into scalable, secure, and maintainable power platform solutions. the ideal candidate will collaborate closely with business stakeholders, project managers, data engineers, and client leadership teams to deliver impactful digital transformation initiatives.

  

key responsibilities


solution architecture \& development

* design, build, and deploy end\-to\-end solutions using:
* power apps (canvas and model\-driven apps)
* power automate
* power bi
* power pages
* architect scalable and secure solutions utilizing dataverse as the central data platform.
* define enterprise architecture standards, including:
* environment strategy
* data modeling
* integration frameworks
* security architecture
* lead technical solution reviews and ensure compliance with governance, coe standards, and data loss prevention (dlp) policies.
* integrate power platform with:
* azure functions
* logic apps
* service bus
* api management
* third\-party applications through apis and custom connectors
* implement application lifecycle management (alm) and ci/cd pipelines using azure devops and/or github actions.
* develop custom extensions, plugins, pcf controls, and integrations where required.


business analysis \& process improvement

* facilitate discovery workshops and requirements\-gathering sessions with business and technical stakeholders.
* analyze and document business processes, workflows, and system requirements.
* translate business needs into:
* user stories
* functional specifications
* technical solution designs
* architecture blueprints
* conduct process mapping exercises and identify opportunities for automation and optimization.
* create and maintain process flow diagrams, data flow documentation, and solution artifacts.
* support solution validation, user acceptance testing (uat), and stakeholder sign\-off activities.


client engagement \& delivery

* act as a trusted advisor to clients throughout solution delivery and adoption.
* lead client\-facing workshops, demonstrations, and executive presentations.
* manage multiple concurrent projects in agile, scrum, or hybrid delivery environments.
* mentor junior developers and citizen developers on power platform best practices.
* produce high\-quality technical documentation, including:
* architecture designs
* runbooks
* deployment guides
* training materials
* support pre\-sales activities, including:
* solution scoping
* effort estimation
* proposal development
* technical presentations


required qualifications


technical expertise

* 5\+ years of hands\-on experience with the microsoft power platform ecosystem.
* deep expertise in:
* power apps
* power automate
* power bi
* power pages
* proven experience designing and implementing model\-driven applications using dataverse.
* strong knowledge of:
* data modeling
* security roles
* business rules
* enterprise solution architecture
* experience with power automate cloud flows, desktop flows (rpa), and process advisor.
* expertise building enterprise\-grade power bi solutions, including:
* semantic models
* row\-level security
* deployment pipelines
* strong understanding of microsoft 365 services including sharepoint, teams, and exchange integrations.
* hands\-on experience integrating power platform with azure services such as:
* azure functions
* logic apps
* api management
* key vault
* microsoft entra id (azure ad)
* proficiency in one or more programming languages:
* javascript
* typescript
* c\#
* python
* experience implementing and managing:
* power platform coe toolkit
* governance frameworks
* dlp policies
* strong understanding of alm and devops practices within power platform environments.


business analysis skills

* experience facilitating requirements workshops and stakeholder interviews.
* strong documentation skills, including:
* functional specifications
* process maps
* use cases
* data flow diagrams
* ability to translate ambiguous business requirements into structured technical solutions.
* familiarity with process improvement methodologies such as lean, six sigma, or bpm frameworks.


preferred qualifications

* microsoft certifications:
* pl\-200: power platform functional consultant
* pl\-300: power bi data analyst
* pl\-400: power platform developer
* pl\-600: power platform solution architect (strongly preferred)
* experience with copilot studio, power virtual agents, and ai builder.
* industry experience within:
* financial services
* retail
* cpg
* construction
* integration experience with enterprise platforms such as:
* sap
* salesforce
* dynamics 365
* exposure to:
* databricks
* dataiku
* azure ai services
* azure machine learning
* prior consulting or professional services experience with direct client engagement.


key competencies

* excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* ability to present technical concepts and architectural decisions to executive and non\-technical audiences.
* strong problem\-solving and analytical thinking capabilities.
* self\-driven and comfortable navigating ambiguity in fast\-paced environments.
* collaborative mindset with experience working across cross\-functional teams.
* passion for innovation and continuous learning, particularly within microsoft's ai and copilot ecosystem.
* strategic thinker with strong attention to detail and governance best practices.


why join matrix global services?


join a growing team delivering innovative microsoft solutions for global clients. you'll have the opportunity to work on enterprise\-scale digital transformation initiatives, leverage the latest microsoft technologies, and help organizations unlock the full potential of the power platform and ai\-driven automation


 why join us?


you’ll work with a talented global team, contribute to meaningful technical initiatives, and help shape a high‑performing devops culture.


matrix is a global, dynamic, and fast‑growing technology services and consulting company with **over 17,000 employees worldwide**. founded in 2001, matrix has grown through significant organic expansion and strategic acquisitions, executing some of the largest and most impactful technology projects in the market.


we specialize in the design, development, and implementation of advanced technologies, software solutions, and digital products. our services include infrastructure and consulting, it outsourcing and offshore delivery, training and assimilation programs, and acting as a trusted implementation and delivery partner for the world’s leading software vendors.


with deep expertise across both the private and public sectors—spanning **finance, telecom, healthcare, hi‑tech, education, defense, and security**—matrix serves a strong customer base in israel alongside a continuously expanding global client portfolio.


at matrix, our people are at the heart of our success. we are a community of talented, creative, and dedicated professionals who are passionate about innovation and excellence. we actively attract, develop, and retain top talent, recognizing that every employee’s contribution is critical to our continued growth and future success.


matrix’s success is built on a **challenging and engaging work environment**, competitive compensation and benefits, and meaningful career development opportunities. we foster a diverse, inclusive culture that encourages collaboration, continuous learning, and growth—together.


join the winning team. be challenged, grow your career, and enjoy the journey in a highly respected global organization.

**to learn more, visit:** www.matrix\-ifs.com

title: Associate Software Engineer - Onsite
description:
*please note this position is based onsite at wellsky’s world headquarters in overland park, ks.*


the **associate software engineer** is responsible for all stages of the software development lifecycle using a variety of technologies and tools to build impactful software solutions. the scope of this job includes building and optimizing comprehensive solutions that prioritize end\-user efficiency and experience.

*we invite you to apply today and join us in shaping the future of healthcare!*

**key responsibilities:**

* lead the design and architecture of major systems and services, and ensure software solutions are scalable, reliable, maintainable, and aligned with business needs.
* collaborate with solution managers, engineers, data scientists, and other stakeholders to define and prioritize technical requirements that meet client needs and business objectives.
* collaborate with teams to ensure sustained quality and reliability of our software solutions, and act as a go\-to expert by identifying and resolving complex, high\-priority issues in both development and production environments.
* actively contribute to code reviews, provide constructive feedback on design and implementation, and provide technical guidance to other engineers to elevate skills, productivity, and overall effectiveness.
* drive innovation by evaluating and implementing new technologies, methodologies, and ai capabilities that improve team efficiency, software performance, and development processes.
* ensure code meets functional and performance requirements, advocate for high\-quality software, and ensure rigorous testing processes, including automated unit tests, integration tests, and other testing frameworks.
* leverage ai tools and platforms as an integral part of daily responsibilities to enhance decision\-making, streamline workflows, and drive data\-informed outcomes.
* perform other job duties as assigned.

**required qualifications:**

* bachelor’s degree in a related field, or equivalent work experience
* 0–2 years of relevant experience (internships or co\-ops included)

**preferred qualifications:**

* **ai\-enabled development:** experience or interest in using ai tools (e.g., claude) to support software development
* **backend development:** experience with one or more languages such as .net/c\#, python, java, or ruby
* **frontend development:** experience with modern web technologies such as typescript/javascript and frameworks like angular, react, or vue
* **apis \& integrations:** familiarity with restful services or web service integration
* **databases:** experience working with relational or cloud\-based databases (e.g., postgresql, mysql, sql server, bigquery)
* **cloud \& infrastructure:** exposure to cloud platforms (e.g., gcp) and infrastructure\-as\-code tools (e.g., terraform)
* **healthcare technology:** familiarity with interoperability standards such as fhir or hl7

**job expectations:**

* willing to work as a part on an on\-call rotation
* willing to work additional or irregular hours as needed
* must work in accordance with applicable security policies and procedures to safeguard company and client information
* must be able to sit and view a computer screen for extended periods of time


wellsky is where independent thinking and collaboration come together to create an authentic culture. we thrive on innovation, inclusiveness, and cohesive perspectives. at wellsky you can make a difference.


wellsky provides equal employment opportunities to all people without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, religion, gender, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, marital status, pregnancy, physical or mental disability, protected medical condition, genetic information, military service, veteran status, or any other status or characteristic protected by law. wellsky is proud to be a drug\-free workplace.

  

applicants for u.s.\-based positions with wellsky must be legally authorized to work in the united states. verification of employment eligibility will be required at the time of hire. certain client\-facing positions may be required to comply with applicable requirements, such as immunizations and occupational health mandates.

  



here are some of the exciting benefits full\-time teammates are eligible to receive at wellsky:

* excellent medical with rx, dental, and vision benefits
* mental health support through eap
* generous paid time off, plus 13 paid holidays
* 100% vested 401(k) retirement plans
* educational assistance up to $2500 per year

title: Associate AI Engineer
description:
**about wellfit:**  

wellfit is the dental industry’s fintech solution! a healthcare fintech company that enhances experiences between patients, providers, employers, and payors.  

  

wellfit provides access to treatment and care by removing financial barriers.  

as a profitable and growing healthcare fintech company, wellfit is investing in ai, automation, and modern engineering practices to improve how we build products, support customers, and deliver innovative solutions across the healthcare and dental ecosystem.  

  

**about the role:**  

the associate ai engineer will support wellfit’s innovation and engineering teams by helping research, prototype, test, and implement ai\-powered solutions across our products, internal tools, and development workflows.  

  

this is a hands\-on engineering role for someone early in their ai career who has a strong software development foundation and wants to grow in applied ai, cloud platforms, automation, and modern product engineering. you will work closely with senior engineers, architects, and business stakeholders to help bring ideas from concept to proof\-of\-concept and, where appropriate, into production\-ready solutions.  

the ideal candidate is curious, technical, coachable, and comfortable experimenting with new technology. you should enjoy building, testing, learning quickly, documenting what you find, and helping the team evaluate whether an idea is technically feasible and valuable to the business.  

  

**what you’ll do**  

* support the development of ai\-powered proof\-of\-concepts, prototypes, and internal tools that align with wellfit’s innovation strategy.
* write clean, maintainable code using python and/or .net technologies to support ai integrations, automation, apis, and experimental solutions.
* assist with integrating ai capabilities into new and existing wellfit technologies, products, and workflows.
* work with senior engineers to evaluate technical approaches, identify tradeoffs, and recommend practical solutions.
* experiment with ai tools, apis, prompts, embeddings, retrieval\-augmented generation, workflow automation, and model\-driven features.
* help test and validate ai\-powered features to ensure outputs are useful, accurate, secure, and aligned with business needs.
* participate in research and development initiatives by applying structured experimentation, documenting assumptions, testing outcomes, and summarizing findings.
* collaborate with engineering, product, and innovation stakeholders to understand business problems and translate them into working prototypes or technical recommendations.
* help create unit tests, regression tests, and system\-level tests to validate new features or changes.
* debug, refactor, and improve code under the guidance of senior technical team members.
* document technical solutions, designs, workflows, findings, and limitations clearly through written documentation and diagrams.
* learn and apply wellfit’s software development standards, engineering processes, and best practices.
* stay current on emerging ai tools, cloud services, and development practices that may improve wellfit’s products or internal operations.

  

**qualifications**  

* bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, data science, information systems, or a related technical field; equivalent practical experience may be considered.
* 1–3\+ years of software development, ai engineering, data engineering, automation, or related technical experience.
* strong hands\-on coding ability in python.
* exposure to .net, c\#, asp.net, or microsoft\-based development environments is strongly preferred.
* familiarity with apis, web services, databases, source control, and modern software development practices.
* foundational understanding of ai, machine learning, generative ai, large language models, prompt engineering, or ai\-assisted development workflows.
* experience building prototypes, proof\-of\-concepts, scripts, internal tools, automation workflows, or small product features.
* exposure to cloud platforms such as azure, aws, or gcp; azure experience is preferred.
* familiarity with azure ai services, azure openai, azure ai foundry, microsoft fabric, or similar platforms is a plus.
* basic understanding of web development, debugging, data structures, algorithms, and software testing.
* experience with git or other source control tools.
* ability to communicate clearly about project status, blockers, risks, and technical findings.
* strong curiosity, initiative, and willingness to learn new technologies quickly.
* ability to work in a collaborative environment and receive technical guidance from senior engineers and architects.

  

**nice to have**  

* experience with fastapi, flask, django, or similar python frameworks.
* exposure to angular, javascript, typescript, or front\-end development.
* experience with sql or relational databases.
* familiarity with microservices, devops concepts, ci/cd, or cloud\-native development.
* experience using ai coding tools such as github copilot, chatgpt, claude, cursor, or similar tools.
* exposure to retrieval\-augmented generation, chatbots, document processing, agentic workflows, or ai\-enabled automation.
* familiarity with design thinking, human\-centered design, or product discovery processes.
* interest in fintech, healthcare technology, dental technology, saas, or data\-driven product development.

  

**who will thrive here**  

you will thrive in this role if you are a builder who likes to experiment, learn quickly, and turn ideas into working examples.  

this is not a pure research role, and it is not a role where you will only talk about ai in theory. you will be expected to write code, test ideas, support proof\-of\-concepts, document findings, and help the team decide which ideas are worth pursuing further.  

  

**you should be comfortable asking questions like:**  

* can ai make this workflow faster, smarter, or more scalable?
* can we build a quick prototype to prove or disprove this idea?
* what are the risks, limitations, or failure points?
* how do we test whether this actually works?
* how could this eventually integrate into wellfit’s existing technology?

  

**why wellfit?**  

* make an impact: your work will help shape how ai is applied inside one of the most innovative healthcare fintech companies in the u.s.
* grow in ai and engineering: work closely with experienced engineers and technical leaders while building practical ai\-powered solutions.
* work with modern technology: gain exposure to modern ai tools, cloud services, automation, and product engineering practices.
* work flexibly: hybrid model based in dallas with 3 days per week in office.
* comprehensive benefits: full medical, dental, vision, and generous pto.
* invest in your future: competitive salary, bonus eligibility, and 401(k) matching.
* fast\-growth environment: a rare opportunity to grow with a profitable startup on a national trajectory.

alongside a competitive annual bonus, we offer a 401(k) with up to a 4% match, generous paid time off, and comprehensive healthcare benefits.

we may use artificial intelligence (ai) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. these tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. if you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: SOLUTIONS ARCHITECT IV
description:
**about banda group international**


banda group international (bgi) is a world\-class, employee\-owned provider of environmental safety, security, technical, and project management support services for a diverse clientele across government and private sectors worldwide. founded on the principles of environmental, health, and safety (eh\&s), bgi is built on a culture of excellence, collaboration, and service. our people are our greatest asset, and we are always looking for talented individuals who share our values and want to grow with us.

**position summary**


this **remote** solutions architect position is responsible for providing expert guidance on the design, implementation, optimization, and governance of enterprise data platforms built on databricks. the role supports the development of scalable, secure, and compliant cloud\-based data solutions, including data engineering, analytics, ai/ml, and streaming workloads. the successful candidate will serve as a technical advisor, collaborating with engineering, cybersecurity, and business teams to establish best practices, support platform modernization, and drive adoption of emerging databricks capabilities.

**essential duties and responsibilities**

* advise onthe architecture, design, and implementation of databricks solutions, including delta lake, unity catalog,lakeflow, databricks sql, mosaic ai, and related platform capabilities.
* design and guide data migration, integration, streaming, and zero\-copy data sharing strategies across cloud and enterprise environments.
* establish security, governance, compliance, performance optimization, and cost management best practices for databricks platforms.
* mentor data engineers, analysts, and ai/mlteams,participatein architecture reviews, and contribute to technical standards and documentation.
* collaborate with cybersecurity, infrastructure, and cross\-functional teams to evaluate emerging technologies and ensure compliance with organizational and regulatory requirements.

**required qualifications**

* minimum of seven (7\) years of experience designing, implementing, and operating databricks solutions using medallion architecture.
* hands\-on experience with delta lake, unity catalog, spark structured streaming,lakeflow(or delta live tables), databricks sql,mlflow, and mosaic ai model serving.
* strong experience designing cloud architectures, including networking, security, storage, and key management services (e.g., vpc/vnet, s3/adls, kms).
* proven experience migrating enterprise data platforms from legacy or on\-premises environments to databricks.
* experience with real\-time streaming, change data capture (cdc), data governance, encryption, access controls, and compliance requirements.
* strongproficiencyin python, sql, apache spark, and databricks notebooks.
* ability to handle confidential information with discretion
* strong communication and organizational skills
* ability to work through problems quickly and effectively and define a clear path to resolution

**preferred qualifications**

* active databricks certifications.
* experience with generative ai, ai agents, and advanced ai/ml solutions within the databricks ecosystem.
* experience with delta sharing, databricks clean rooms, and governed data exchange architectures.
* familiarity with oracle e\-business suite (ebs), sap enterprise data, sap business data cloud (bdc), or sap data sphere integrations.
* experience with databricks apps,lakeflowdesigner, genie, databricks one, ci/cd pipelines, and infrastructure\-as\-code tools such as terraform.
* experience designing business intelligence reporting layers, data quality frameworks, and enterprise data governance solutions.
* experience supporting highly regulated industries such as utilities, healthcare, government, or other compliance\-driven environments.

**what we offer**


bgi offers a competitive salary and a comprehensive benefits package for eligible full\-time employees, in accordance with plan documents, including:

* pay depending on experience

employee stock ownership plan (esop) * \- giving employees a direct stake in the company's long\-term success
* 100% employer\-paid dental, vision, life, std/ltd for all full\-time employees; dependents can be added with payroll contributions

medical coverage * \- ppo or hdhp plan options; dependents can be added with payroll contributions
* abundant employer contribution for hsa enrollees
* accident, critical illness, and voluntary life insurance
* robust pto plan and 11 paid holidays per year
* generous 401(k) with safe harbor program and up to 4% dollar\-for\-dollar match
* $1,500 yearly personal development reimbursement for all levels of employees
* corporate gym membership rates at orangetheory fitness

veteran support * \- military leave program
* excellent working environment with team building and bonding events

**how to apply**


if you are interested in this position and meet the qualifications, please submit your resume, cover letter, and salary expectations via the application portal.


banda group international is committed to hiring veterans and those who have sacrificed for our country. bring your skills, forge a new path with the bgi family, and continue the bonds of service with fellow veterans.


bgi is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. we do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, sex, age, non\-disqualifying physical or mental disability, national origin, veteran status, or any other basis covered by appropriate law. all employment is decided based on qualifications, merit, and business needs. bgi believes that diversity and inclusion among our teammates are critical to our success as a global company, and we seek to recruit, develop, and retain the most talented people from a diverse candidate pool.

title: Software Engineer III - Database
description:
**job description**  

  

  

we have an exciting and rewarding opportunity for you to take your software engineering career to the next level.


as a software engineer iii at jpmorgan chase within the consumer and community banking, you serve as a seasoned member of an agile team to design and deliver trusted market\-leading technology products in a secure, stable, and scalable way. you are responsible for carrying out critical technology solutions across multiple technical areas within various business functions in support of the firm's business objectives.

**job responsibilities**

* contribute as database administration and development expert, working with application development teams to develop, execute and support database modernization/optimization/migration activities.
* provide modernization support to application development (ad) teams through the analysis, migration, and post migration efforts for their database footprints.
* partner with paas, dbaas, and cloud delivery teams to resolve issues and influence implementation of self service capabilities to support the ad teams.
* contribute to development of database modernization patterns.
* contribute to tactical and strategic database modernization planning.
* contribute to the design and development of tools to accelerate modernization efforts.
* **leverages enterprise\-authorized ai coding assist tools within the work environment to improve code quality, delivery speed, and productivity across complex deliverables (e.g., code generation/refactoring, unit test creation, documentation), while validating outputs through peer review, automated testing, and secure coding standards; contributes learnings and reusable patterns to improve broader team effectiveness.**
* **applies knowledge of tools within the software development life cycle toolchain, including enterprise\-authorized ai\-assisted development and automation capabilities, to improve the value realized by automation.**
* provide mentorship to software engineers and ad teams, and participate in learning activities to enhance the ad team database capabilities.
* contribute to development of training and professional development materials related to database modernization/optimization.

**required qualifications, capabilities, and skills**

* formal training or certification on software engineering concepts and 3\+ years as database administrator/engineer
* experience database development and configuration.
* demonstrable database design and architecture experience.
* demonstrable experience performing database upgrades and migrations.
* experience with aws and associated database services.
* experience supporting databases in devops.
* experience supporting/integrating ddl and dml with ci/cd tools (jenkins, git/bit bucket, etc…).
* **hands\-on experience using enterprise\-authorized ai\-assisted software development tools within the work environment (e.g., for coding, test creation, troubleshooting, or documentation) with demonstrated ability to critically evaluate, validate, and refine ai\-generated outputs for correctness, performance, and security.**
* **understanding of responsible ai use in engineering workflows, including data sensitivity considerations, secure handling of inputs/outputs, and adherence to resiliency and security expectations; ability to guide peers on safe and effective usage within team practices.**
* must be able to self\-motivate to support delivery whether individually or as part of a team.




**preferred qualifications, capabilities, and skills**

* direct experience with postgresql, cockroachdb, and cassandra databases.
* application programming experience with java and/or python.
* experience working in/with teams performing agile software development.
* strong desire to master emerging technologies and share experience with other team members.
* experience supporting teams in upskilling database development and support competencies.
* excellent written and verbal communication skills.


**about us**  

  

  

chase is a leading financial services firm, helping nearly half of america's households and small businesses achieve their financial goals through a broad range of financial products. our mission is to create engaged, lifelong relationships and put our customers at the heart of everything we do. we also help small businesses, nonprofits and cities grow, delivering solutions to solve all their financial needs.


we offer a competitive total rewards package including base salary determined based on the role, experience, skill set and location. those in eligible roles may receive commission\-based pay and/or discretionary incentive compensation, paid in the form of cash and/or forfeitable equity, awarded in recognition of individual achievements and contributions. we also offer a range of benefits and programs to meet employee needs, based on eligibility. these benefits include comprehensive health care coverage, on\-site health and wellness centers, a retirement savings plan, backup childcare, tuition reimbursement, mental health support, financial coaching and more. additional details about total compensation and benefits will be provided during the hiring process.


we recognize that our people are our strength and the diverse talents they bring to our global workforce are directly linked to our success. we are an equal opportunity employer and place a high value on diversity and inclusion at our company. we do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute, including race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital or veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. we also make reasonable accommodations for applicants' and employees' religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs. visit our faqs for more information about requesting an accommodation.


equal opportunity employer/disability/veterans

  

  

  

**about the team**
  

  

our consumer \& community banking group depends on innovators like you to serve consumers, small businesses, municipalities and non\-profits. you'll support the delivery of award winning tools and services that cover everything from personal and small business banking as well as lending, mortgages, credit cards, payments, auto finance and investment advice. this group is also focused on developing and delivering cutting edged mobile applications, digital experiences and next generation banking technology solutions to better serve our clients and customers.

title: Python Developer
description:
bright vision technologies is a forward\-thinking software development company dedicated to building innovative solutions that help businesses automate and optimize their operations. we leverage cutting\-edge technologies to create scalable, secure, and user\-friendly applications.  

as we continue to grow, we’re looking for a skilled python developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to our mission of transforming business processes through technology.  

this is a fantastic opportunity to join an established and well\-respected organization offering tremendous career growth potential.  

**python developer**
====================

**job title:** python developer  

**location:** 100% remote (continental united states)  

**position type:** in\-house bright vision technologies sow engagement (no third\-party client or vendor)  

**experience:** 5\+ years  

**salary range :** $100k to $150k per annnum  

**sponsorship:** new h1b sponsorship may be available for qualified candidates. h1b transfers also welcomed.  

**employment type:** full\-time, direct w2 with bright vision technologies (no c2c, no 1099, no third\-party)  

**engagement:** long\-term, multi\-year, aligned to the bright vision sow delivery roadmap  

**compensation:** competitive base salary commensurate with experience, plus benefits.  

  

**employment terms \& visa policy**  

**this is a 100% remote, full\-time, direct w2 position with bright vision technologies.**  

**this role is part of bright vision technologies’ in\-house statement of work (sow) engagement.** the client, end customer, and employer for this position is bright vision technologies — there is no third\-party client, vendor, or implementation partner involved.  

we do not engage in c2c, 1099, or third\-party arrangements for this role.  

**but strictly no c2c/1099/3rd party companies. all our roles are w2 and no 3rd party brokering please.**  

candidates must be willing to work directly as a full\-time w2 employee of bright vision technologies and contribute to our in\-house sow deliverables.  

new h1b sponsorship may be available for qualified candidates for this role.  

**candidates who are currently on a valid h1b visa and require a transfer are also welcome to apply. we will support h1b transfers for qualified candidates.**  

for every role, a technical coding assessment is mandatory. please apply only if you are confident in your technical abilities and hands\-on experience.  

  

**job summary**  

we are seeking an experienced python developer to design, build, and continuously enhance complex enterprise\-grade applications, data\-intensive services, and automation platforms. this is a hands\-on engineering role focused on delivering robust, secure, and high\-performance python systems that operate reliably within distributed and mission\-critical production environments. the ideal candidate will bring deep python expertise combined with strong fundamentals in software architecture, data engineering, and operational support, and will partner closely with product, data, and infrastructure teams to translate ambiguous business problems into well\-engineered technical solutions. you will be expected to think beyond surface\-level fixes, identify root causes of complex issues, and proactively raise the engineering bar across the team.  

**key responsibilities*** provide end\-to\-end design, development, and advanced technical troubleshooting for complex enterprise\-grade python applications, reaching beyond routine approaches to solve novel and non\-trivial technical problems.
* develop secure, high\-quality, production\-ready python code and implement algorithms that perform reliably within distributed systems, with thoughtful consideration of concurrency, fault\-tolerance, and observability.
* produce architecture and design artifacts for complex applications, ensuring that day\-to\-day development adheres to defined design constraints, performance requirements, and enterprise standards.
* develop and optimize data processing logic for large\-scale datasets, including extraction, transformation, validation, deduplication, enrichment, and performance tuning to support both batch and near\-real\-time workloads.
* gather, analyze, and synthesize large and diverse datasets to support continuous improvement of applications and business processes, surfacing insights that lead to measurable improvements in product, reliability, or cost.
* develop reporting mechanisms, dashboards, and data visualizations where required to support operational insights, leveraging libraries and tools appropriate to the stakeholder audience.
* identify hidden defects, performance bottlenecks, and architectural weaknesses, and proactively implement improvements to coding standards, system reliability, and overall maintainability.
* contribute substantively to engineering best practices, conduct thorough peer code reviews, and participate constructively in architectural design discussions, mentoring less\-senior engineers along the way.
* participate fully in agile development cycles and ci/cd processes, ensuring consistent, stable, and frequent deployments with appropriate testing, rollback, and monitoring strategies in place.
* collaborate closely with cross\-functional stakeholders — product managers, data scientists, operations engineers, and business analysts — to clarify requirements and translate them into scalable technical solutions.
* support operational stability through structured incident response, debugging, log analysis, and post\-incident reviews in enterprise environments, contributing actionable preventative measures.

**required qualifications*** bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related technical discipline.
* five or more years of applied python development experience in enterprise\-grade environments.
* strong experience building and maintaining large\-scale production applications with significant uptime and reliability requirements.
* hands\-on experience with relational database systems such as oracle, ms sql server, postgresql, or sybase, including query tuning and schema design.
* strong understanding of the full software development lifecycle (sdlc), including requirements, design, build, test, release, and ongoing support.
* proven hands\-on experience across system design, application development, automated testing, and operational support.
* strong working knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and computational efficiency, with the ability to make sound design trade\-offs.
* demonstrated experience debugging and maintaining complex, enterprise\-level applications in production.
* solid understanding of agile methodologies, ci/cd practices, application resiliency patterns, and secure coding standards.
* ability to manage multiple concurrent projects in dynamic, fast\-changing environments while keeping stakeholders well informed.
* strong written and verbal communication skills, with experience collaborating with both technical and business teams.

**preferred qualifications*** strong shell scripting skills in unix/linux environments and comfort working with command\-line tooling.
* solid grounding in mathematical and statistical concepts and the ability to translate them into code.
* hands\-on experience with the python data and ml ecosystem, including numpy, pandas, scipy, scikit\-learn, tensorflow, and pytorch.
* working exposure to aws cloud services and cloud\-native storage technologies such as s3, rds, dynamodb, and glue.

  

**how to apply**  

would you like to know more about this opportunity?  

for immediate consideration, please send your resume to jaya@bvteck.com or contact us at (908\) 505\-3545\. learn more about bright vision technologies at www.bvteck.com.  

  

we recognize that our people are our strength, and the diverse talents they bring to our global workforce are directly linked to our success. we are an equal opportunity employer and place a high value on diversity and inclusion at our company. we do not discriminate on the basis of any protected attribute, including race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, marital or veteran status, pregnancy or disability, or any other basis protected under applicable law. we also make reasonable accommodations for applicants’ and employees’ religious practices and beliefs, as well as mental health or physical disability needs.  

bright vision technologies is an equal opportunity employer, including disability/veterans.  

position offered by “no fee agency.”  

equal employment opportunity (eeo) statement


bright vision technologies (bv teck) is committed to equal employment opportunity (eeo) for all employees and applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, genetic information, disability, veteran status, or any other protected status as defined by applicable federal, state, or local laws. this commitment extends to all aspects of employment, including recruitment, hiring, training, compensation, promotion, transfer, leaves of absence, termination, layoffs, and recall.


bv teck expressly prohibits any form of workplace harassment or discrimination. any improper interference with employees' ability to perform their job duties may result in disciplinary action up to and including termination of employment.
